states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_check())
states.description: Check diagonally to get into a better passing lane.

states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: Go to the ball and get possession after teammate's pass.

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Pass to teammate who is now in good position.

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_goal())
states.description: Move close to goal to create shooting opportunity.

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: Take a shot at the goal.

transitions.description: Wait until teammate passes to you after you check.
Decide: pass back to teammate or dribble depending on opponent. Pass to teammate who is now in good position.
Decide: pass back to teammate or dribble depending on opponent. Move close to goal to create shooting opportunity.
Wait until you are close to goal and can shoot. Take a shot at the goal.
